sections.subject: History

entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
This course includeds the following topic(s): Canadian History: Grades 5-6, World History: Grades 4-6, Ancient History: Grades 5-6

About World History: Grades 4-6
Through the reading of history stories and biographies, students experience what life was like in different times and places. They are exposed to the everyday experiences as well as the major events from our current history cycle (1800-1900). Students will also view images, reference maps, and work on their century charts and Book of Centuries as part of their lessons.

About Ancient History: Grades 5-6
Study history stories about the ancient civilizations that lived from 100 BC to 350 AD. View images and reference atlases and maps to set the people and events in their time and place. Update History Charts and Book of Centuries as appropriate for student level.

About Canadian History: Grades 5-6
Read about Canadian history from 1800-1900 through a variety of texts: engaging narratives, history spines, primary source documents, and historical fiction. These books, which offer a range of perspectives, will immerse students in the time period and allow them to see the world through the eyes of those who lived it. Students will view images and reference atlases and maps to set the people and events in their time and place. Update History Charts and Book of Centuries as appropriate for student level.

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content:
World History: Grades 4-6
This course is the same for 4th-6th graders. In grade 5, students may begin their Book of Centuries.

Canadian History: Grades 5-6
This course is the same for students in grades 5 and 6. In grade 5, students may begin their Book of Centuries. It could be easily modified for students in grade 4, if combining.

rows.label: World History: Grades 4-6
rows.books: Under the Hawthorn Tree, William Wilberforce: The Freedom Fighter, Commodore Perry in the Land of the Shogun

rows.label: Ancient History: Grades 5-6
rows.books: The Bronze Bow, Redemption: The Church in Ancient Times

rows.label: Canadian History: Grades 5-6
rows.books: The Story of Canada, Joe and the Wreck of the Tribune, Tecumseh, The Loxleys and Confederation
